Private development · Founder validation phase

A long-term behavioural companion that learns, adapts, and grows more valuable over time.

Archie remembers your journey the way a person would. Not as data. As a relationship that deepens with every conversation.

Discover Archie Investor enquiries
The problem

The industry solved information. It never solved consistency.

Millions of people know exactly what they should do. They fail anyway. Not because of ignorance, but because nobody notices when they stop. Nobody asks how they are. Nobody remembers where they struggled last month.

People do not fail because they lack information. They fail because nobody notices when they stop.

The gap every app ignores

Apps measure activity. They do not build relationships.

Every fitness product on the market tracks what you do. None of them remember who you are, what you told them last month, why this matters to you, or where you usually fall off. No two interactions connect. The user is invisible the moment they close the app.

What Archie does differently

Archie remembers the person behind the data.

Every conversation becomes part of a permanent, structured record that grows more valuable over time. Archie knows your history, your motivations, your setbacks and your milestones. The longer you use it, the better it understands you. No other product in this space works this way.

How Archie works

Five engines. One relationship.

Archie is not a single feature. It is an architecture designed to understand people, not just their data, and to grow more useful with every interaction.

Identity Engine
Archie builds an evolving picture of who you are. Goals, preferences, communication style, lifestyle, schedule, relationships. This profile is never static. Every conversation refines it.
Memory Engine
Archie's greatest competitive advantage. Unlike traditional AI assistants, Archie stores structured long-term memories rather than relying on conversation history. Weight history, personal records, motivations, milestones, promises, setbacks. Everything remains connected. The AI model is replaceable. The memory is not.
Decision Engine
Every recommendation is reasoned, not generated. Archie combines current goals, sleep quality, training load, nutrition, mood, and recovery before producing guidance. It always explains why, building trust rather than issuing instructions.
Behaviour Engine
Archie never responds like a generic AI assistant. Every response passes through behavioural rules: understand before advising, listen for emotion before information, encourage before correcting, challenge without judging. Behaviour becomes the product.
Conversation Engine
Conversation is the interface. Everything else is secondary. Voice-first. Natural speech. No forms, no dashboards to navigate. Users speak with Archie. Archie listens, thinks, and responds with increasing personalisation over time.
The conversation

It responds to the person. Not the question.

When someone asks if they will ever lose the weight, the literal question is about nutrition. The real question is about confidence. Archie addresses what matters first.

The Memory Engine

Structured memory. Not conversation history.

Every memory carries importance, confidence, frequency and source. Archie knows what it knows with certainty, what it knows tentatively, and what it should ask again. Relationship milestones are permanent and never pruned.

The experience

The dashboard begins with Archie. Not data.

Every morning, Archie leads with context rather than statistics. It tells you what the numbers mean and what to do about them. The metrics follow. They do not lead.

Every screen feels like Archie. Not software.

The interface disappears behind the relationship. Voice is always available. Dashboards are things Archie shows you, not places you navigate to.

Development roadmap

Prove it first. Then scale.

Archie is being built with discipline. Every phase unlocks the next only after the previous has been validated in real-world use.

Phase One · Now

Founder Validation Programme

Twelve months of documented real-world use by the founder. Every workout, meal, conversation and setback becomes product validation data. Archie proves it changes behaviour before a single paying user is acquired.

In progress
Phase Two

Public Launch

Voice-first subscription platform launching only after the founder case study demonstrates measurable behavioural change. The public receives a product that has already been proven, not a beta test.

Following validation
Phase Three

Archie One

Archie begins with software. Archie One follows only after the software has been proven. A premium wearable designed to deepen Archie's understanding, not compete with existing smartwatches.

Post commercial validation
Phase Four

Platform Expansion

The same conversation, memory and behavioural architecture applied to healthcare, corporate wellbeing and clinical research. The knowledge domain changes. The core technology does not.

Long-term vision
Concept · Phase Three roadmap item Archie One

The first wearable built for an AI companion.

Archie One is not intended to compete with existing smartwatches. It is designed to exist specifically alongside Archie, continuously deepening its understanding of the user through biometric and activity data captured throughout the day.

Heart rate, HRV, sleep analysis, activity tracking, recovery metrics, daily readiness. Development begins only after the software platform has been validated commercially. The wearable enhances the experience. It is never required to use Archie.

Archie One is a concept design representing a future roadmap item. It is not currently in development. Renders shown are illustrative of design direction only.

Founder validation

Built to earn trust before asking for it.

"Before asking the public to trust a product, I intend to trust it myself. For twelve months, Archie will be my primary health and fitness companion. Every workout, every meal, every conversation will be documented."

This is not a proof of concept. It is a Founder Validation Programme, a systematic and documented twelve-month transformation that becomes the product's first and most credible case study. Only after that validation is complete will Archie launch publicly. This is the discipline investors should expect from every founder building in this space.

Technology

Provider-agnostic. Relationship-native.

Archie does not depend on any single AI provider. The behaviour, memory, decision-making and relationship model are owned entirely by Archie. External providers supply AI models, speech recognition and infrastructure. As technology improves, Archie adopts it without rebuilding what matters.

What Archie owns

The Memory Architecture

Structured long-term memory with importance, confidence, frequency and source metadata on every stored fact. The memory system is Archie's primary intellectual property, not the AI model underneath it.

What Archie owns

The Behaviour Engine

A complete set of communication rules that define how Archie speaks, challenges, encourages and responds. These rules are independent of whichever language model powers the product at any given time.

The infrastructure

Built for scale from day one

Next.js progressive web application, Supabase database, Vercel hosting, OpenAI Whisper for voice transcription. Provider-agnostic AI layer supporting multiple model providers simultaneously.

The moat

Brains commoditise. Memory does not.

OpenAI, Anthropic and Google are building better models. Archie is building better memory. Switching the underlying AI model should feel like changing a car engine. Invisible to the driver.
